title: Irukiraai Song Lyrics Idhu Enna Maayam
stanzas:
engum un muga bimbam
nenchil vanthadhu thangum
vettridatil ennai vittu
Sendrathaenadi

kannil neeradhu pongum
kadhal vandhathu angum
sattru munbu
punnagaita mugam engadi

velicham ilaamal nizhalum illai
uyire ne illaamal naanum illai
vidindhum enn vaanil vaannam illai

ini varum iravilum
ini varum pagalilum
kanavugal yen thanjam
anbe va uyire

maattram illaamal vaazhkai illai
mazhai mattum tharaadhu vaanavillai
yeno enn nenjam ketkavillai
arugil irundhum kadhal
pirivil perugidume

oru murai theriyidhu
maru murai maraiyidhu
tholaiyidhu un bimbam

edhu varai edhuvarai
idaiveli thodarndhidum
kettkuthu enn nenjam
aruge va uyire

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Irukiraai?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of being in love.

Who are the singers of Irukiraai?

The song is sung by GV Prakash Kumar and Harini.

What is the context of the song in the movie Idhu Enna Maayam?

The song is set in a romantic context, reflecting the protagonist's feelings of love and yearning.

Who composed the music for Irukiraai?

The music was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was the movie Idhu Enna Maayam released?

The movie was released in the year 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Irukiraai from Idhu Enna Maayam is a beautiful romantic duet that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by GV Prakash Kumar and Harini, the melody evokes a sense of soothing nostalgia. The lyrics express the protagonist's deep emotions and yearning for their beloved. The song's placement in the movie highlights the emotional journey of love, making it a memorable piece in the film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Irukiraai from the movie Idhu Enna Maayam. This soulful duet by GV Prakash Kumar and Harini captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into the soothing tunes crafted by GV Prakash Kumar's magical composition.
stanzaMeanings: You are here even when you are not, so I am here even when I am not.
Your face appears everywhere in my heart, but in success, it left me.
Tears fill my eyes, love has come, but where is the smiling face from before?
You are here even when you are not, so I am here even when I am not.
Without light, there is no shadow. Without you, I am not here. Even when the day breaks, there is no color in my sky.
Paths are covered in dew, and rain comes in the sun.
When you come near, I feel a little dizzy again.
My heart cries out as it touches the burning flowers.
In the nights and days to come, dreams are my refuge. Come, my love, my life.
You are here even when you are not, so I am here even when I am not.
Without change, there is no life. The sky doesn't give rainbows without rain. Why doesn't my heart listen? Even when close, love grows apart.
Once it appears, then it disappears, your image fades away.
Dreams come in the morning and fade away, love brings great joy.
How long will this distance continue? My heart asks, come close, my life.
You are here even when you are not, so I am here even when I am not.
